MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2024 Vacated

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Petition For Consolidation
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Off Calendar

Verified Petition For Invalidation, Accounting, Removal Of Purported Trustee, Surcharge, Return Of Trust Assets, And Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Oct-09-2023 Continued To Mar-04-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PTR-22-305251 Restated Sandra A. Huggins 1989 Trust and PTR-22-305255 Gloria B. Lund 1989 Trust.

Appearances: John Rueppel and Azita Rahim appeared via zoom for Bonnie and Mark McFadden (petitioners).
Edward Koplowitz appeared via zoom for Faye Taam (respondent).

Discussion was held regarding consolidating the trust, that parties agree to a trial date, and that a petition for consolidation would need to be filed with the Courts. Status for petition for consolidation is set for November 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Notice of errata re: Verified petition for invalidation, Accounting, Removal of trustee, Surcharge, Return of trust assets, and Financial elder abuse (PTR-22-305251). Notice of errata re: Verified petition for invalidation, Accounting, Removal of trustee, Surcharge, Return of trust assets, and Financial elder abuse (PTR-22-305255). Both are set for trial in the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) on March 04, 2024 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Status Of Scheduling Mediation
Off Calendar Jul-03-2023 Off Calendar

Verified Petition For Invalidation, Accounting, Removal Of Purported Trustee, Surcharge, Return Of Trust Assets, And Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Jul-03-2023 Continued To Oct-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Invalidation, Accounting, Removal Of Purported Trustee, Surcharge, Return Of Trust Assets, And Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Continued To Jul-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: John Rueppel and Azita Rahim appearing via zoom for Bonnie McMechen (Petitioner).
Ed Koplowitz appearing via zoom for Faye Taam (respondent).

Discussion was held in regard to attending mediation by both parties and trying to resolve the matter before setting it for trial. (1) Verified petition for invalidation etc., and (2) Verified petition for invalidation etc., are continued to July 03, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The status of scheduling mediation is set for July 03, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt; Deputy: Choi: Not reported.
